zh.lifeSummary: Henry Cagle於1770年出生在美國北卡羅來納州波藍德。他於1827年與Jemima Barbee在美國田納西州希克曼結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1850年住在美國田納西州德卡度。他去世於1860年在美國田納西州澤維享年90歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Henry Cagle于1770年出生在美国北卡罗来纳州波藍德。他于1827年与Jemima Barbee在美国田纳西州希克曼结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1850年住在美国田纳西州德卡度。他去世于1860年在美国田纳西州澤維享年90岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cagle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German Kagel , Kegel , Kögel or Kogel .

variants.name: Kagel
meanings: metonymic occupational name for a maker of hoods or hooded robes and cloaks, from Low German Kogel, Kagel (from Latin cuculla ‘sphere’).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: Creating the Eleventh Amendment
historicEvents.description: The Eleventh Amendment restricts the ability of any people to start a lawsuit against the states in federal court.

historicEvents.title: Tennessee Becomes a State
historicEvents.description: On June 1, 1796, Tennessee became the 16th state.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Tennessee Secretart of State-From Territory to State

historicEvents.title: Panic! of 1819
historicEvents.description: With the Aftermath of the Napoleonic Wars the global market for trade was down. During this time, America had its first financial crisis and it lasted for only two years.

historicEvents.title: Trail of Tears
historicEvents.description: In the 1830's, President Jackson called for all the Native Americans to be forced off their own land. As the Cherokee were forced out of North Carolina many of them hid in the mountains of North Carolina.
historicEvents.urlTitle: North Carolina Trail of Tears Association

historicEvents.description: U.S. acquires vast tracts of Mexican territory in wake of Mexican War including California and New Mexico.
Tennessee was known as the Volunteer State because during the Mexican War the government asked Tennessee for 3,000 volunteer soldiers and 30,000 joined.

en.lifeSummary: Henry Cagle was born in 1770, in Cumberland, North Carolina, United States. He married Jemima Barbee in 1827, in Hickman, Tennessee, United States. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He lived in Decatur, Tennessee, United States in 1850. He died in 1860, in Sevier, Tennessee, United States, at the age of 90.

fr.lifeSummary: Henry Cagle est né en 1770, à Cumberland, Caroline du Nord, États-Unis. Il a épousé Jemima Barbee en 1827, à Hickman, Tennessee, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il a vécu à Decatur, Tennessee, États-Unis en 1850. Il est décédé en 1860, à Sevier, Tennessee, États-Unis, à l’âge de 90 ans.

de.New Madrid, Missouri, USA: New Madrid, New Madrid, Missouri, Vereinigte Staaten
de.lifeSummary: Henry Cagle wurde 1770 in Cumberland, North Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten geboren. Er hat 1827 in Hickman, Tennessee, Vereinigte Staaten Jemima Barbee geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1850 hat er in Decatur, Tennessee, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb 1860 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Sevier, Tennessee, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Henry Cagle è nato il nel 1770 nel Cumberland, Carolina del Nord, Stati Uniti d'America. Lui sposato Jemima Barbee nel 1827, nel Hickman, Tennessee, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Vissuto a Decatur, Tennessee, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1850. Morì nel 1860, nel Sevier, Tennessee, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 90 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Cagleは1770年にアメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州クウンバーランドで生まれた。1827年にアメリカ合衆国テネシー州ヒクマンでJemima Barbeeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1850年にはアメリカ合衆国テネシー州デカトゥルに住んでいた。彼は1860年にアメリカ合衆国テネシー州セヴィエルで90歳で死去した。

ko.New Madrid, Missouri, USA: 미국 미주리 주 뉴 매드리드 뉴 매드리드
ko.lifeSummary: Henry Cagle(은)는 1770년 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주 c벌랜드에서 태어났다. 그는 1827년 미국 테네시 주 힉먼에서 Jemima Barbee(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1850년도에 미국 테네시 주 데카투르에서 살았다. 그는 1860년 미국 테네시 주 세비어에서 90세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Henry Cagle nasceu em 1770, em Cumberland, Carolina do Norte, Estados Unidos da América. Ele casou-se com Jemima Barbee em 1827, em Hickman, Tenessi, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele viveu em Decatur, Tenessi, Estados Unidos da América em 1850. Ele faleceu em 1860, em Sevier, Tenessi, Estados Unidos da América, com 90 anos.

ru.New Madrid, Missouri, USA: ню мадрид, ню мадрид, Миссури, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Henry Cagle родился в 1770 г. в местности кумбирланд, Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты. Он женился на женщине по имени Jemima Barbee в 1827 г. в местности хиккман, Теннесси, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он жил в местности декатур, Теннесси, Соединенные штаты в 1850 году. Он умер в 1860 г. в местности севиир, Теннесси, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 90 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Henry Cagle nació en 1770, en Cumberland, Carolina del Norte, Estados Unidos. Se casó con Jemima Barbee en 1827, en Hickman, Tennessee, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Vivió en Decatur, Tennessee, Estados Unidos en 1850. Murió en 1860, en Sevier, Tennessee, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 90 años.
